stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
During preparation for your flight, you find that your AUTOPILOT doesn't work. Following your OM, you decide to consult the MEL for your aircraft in section 22-01A. Can you carry out a CAT II instrument approach, within the requirements of the MEL?

options.a: No, because at least one autopilot is required to carry out this type of approach.
options.b: Yes, this procedure doesn't need an autopilot to carry out this type of approach.
options.c: No, two autopilots are required to be functioning.
options.d: Yes, CAT II approaches can be flown manually.
